title: Bubbles tool-call evidence log entry
description: One JSONL line in .specify/runtime/tool-calls.jsonl. Records a single gate-relevant command invocation with provenance fields the evidence gate can verify deterministically. Schema v2 (v5.2) adds schemaVersion + framework provenance; readers MUST accept both v1 (no schemaVersion) and v2 entries.

schemaVersion.description: Record schema version. Absent or 1 = v5.1 shape. 2 = v5.2 shape (includes framework field). Readers MUST accept both. v3+ will be additive over v2.

framework.description: Bubbles framework provenance at time of record (v2+). Lets the evidence gate detect cross-version log entries.

name.description: Always 'bubbles' for entries written by the framework's tool-log.sh.

version.description: Bubbles framework VERSION at record time (e.g. '5.2.0').

sourceGitSha.description: Git SHA of the bubbles framework checkout that produced this entry, when resolvable.

ts.description: ISO-8601 timestamp when the command completed.

sessionId.description: Opaque per-session identifier. Same session = same string across all entries; different sessions MUST differ.

agent.description: Name of the Bubbles agent (or 'human' / 'ci') that invoked the command.

spec.description: Spec slug (e.g. '042-feature-name') the command relates to. Empty for framework-level commands.

scope.description: Scope identifier within the spec, when applicable.

cmd.description: The literal command line executed (post-shell-expansion, pre-redirection). Used for matching against DoD-recorded command claims.

exitCode.description: Process exit code. Evidence gates treat exitCode=0 as PASS unless the DoD item explicitly expects failure.

durationMs.description: Wall-clock duration in milliseconds. Optional but recommended.

stdoutHash.description: sha256 of captured stdout. Used to detect copy-paste fabrication across evidence blocks.

stdoutBytes.description: Size of captured stdout in bytes.

stderrBytes.description: Size of captured stderr in bytes.
